title: Bitget to Issue Visa Crypto Card for Spending Across APAC
message_html: Bitget to Issue Visa Crypto Card for Spending Across APAC ...
snippet: Bitget, the world’s largest Universal Exchange (UEX), in partnership with Visa and DCS, launched the Bitget Card across selected markets in Asia Pacific (APAC), extending crypto out of exchanges into everyday spending and marking another step toward a more unified financial experience where digital
